groupings.title: Start Here
groupings.description: Orchestrator and entry point — confirms authorization and routes you to the right phase.

groupings.title: Recon & Planning
groupings.description: Discover the real attack surface and rank what to test first, before touching code.

groupings.title: Find & Exploit
groupings.description: Static (white-box) source review and the execution harness for running tests safely on apps you own.

groupings.title: Deep-Dive Specialists
groupings.description: Focused testers for each vulnerability class across web, API, auth, logic, and infrastructure.

groupings.title: Chain, Fix & Report
groupings.description: Combine findings into end-to-end attack paths, apply secure-coding fixes, then score and write up results.
